sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40521" key="e)piplastw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-πλαστώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n40521.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suitable for a plaster</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:55:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.55.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
